---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What workflow are you trying to support? What can you not do today?

## Proposal

How might it work? Sketch the UI or API if useful.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links to similar features elsewhere, references, etc.
